title: Telnyx home — Brotell agency context, $5.07 credit
html:
telnyx dashboard down to $5.07 credit (was $9.57 on Nov-4) under what looks like a "Brotell ChM" / agency context — Yahir bleeding small balance while the toll-free verification saga drags. Add-payment + buy-numbers CTAs prominent.

telnyx · vrtl pirates · outpace · toll free verification · infra blockers
